hypothesis: The accepted risk_on_unmodified 1.25x sizing lift may be too broad; requiring regime_exit_score >= 0.08 could keep the lift for stronger risk-on candidates while removing extra risk from weaker risk-on inventory.
change_summary: Temporarily added RISK_ON_UNMODIFIED_MIN_REGIME_EXIT_SCORE=0.08 to the shared portfolio_engine sizing branch. The patch changed only whether the existing non-stacking risk_on_unmodified 1.25x multiplier fired. It was reverted after fixed-window testing because EV regressed in late_strong and old_thin while mid_weak was unchanged.
component: quant/constants.py, quant/portfolio_engine.py (temporary patch reverted after rejection)

parameters.single_causal_variable: minimum regime_exit_score for risk_on_unmodified risk lift
parameters.old_value: no minimum score beyond regime_exit_bucket == risk_on
parameters.stacking_policy: unchanged; applies only when no other sizing rule fired

market_regime_summary.late_strong: slow-melt bull / accepted-stack dominant tape where low-score risk_on winners still mattered
market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull where the threshold did not change realized trades
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape where removing the low-score lift reduced winner capture more than it reduced losses

delta_metrics.gate4_basis: Rejected: EV regressed in 2/3 fixed windows, aggregate EV fell -0.0530, and aggregate PnL fell -$1,616.20. Trade count, win rate, and survival did not improve.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft-ranking remains sample-limited, so this tested deterministic shared sizing alpha instead of LLM behavior.

history_guardrails.not_repeating_simple_risk_on_leverage_ab: This did not raise the accepted 1.25x multiplier; it tested a stricter eligibility discriminator.
history_guardrails.not_repeating_slot_or_sector_priority: No slot capacity, candidate ordering, or sector priority changed.
history_guardrails.not_repeating_technology_breakout: The tested discriminator applied to plain unmodified risk_on inventory, not Technology breakout promotion.

rejection_reason: The 0.08 score threshold removed useful low-score risk_on winner exposure in late_strong and old_thin. The existing broad non-stacking risk_on_unmodified rule remains better than this simple score gate.
next_retry_requires: Do not retry nearby regime_exit_score thresholds for risk_on_unmodified eligibility without a new tail-risk or event discriminator.
A valid retry must explain why low-score risk_on winners should be separated without cutting the late_strong and old_thin winner capture observed here.
Forward evidence or a richer state variable is needed before narrowing the accepted risk_on_unmodified lift.
